texto: I believe one of the most sacrificial acts of love adoptive parents can do is to give up their preconceptions and agendas about what their child's views "should" be and be open to hear the conflicting emotions and thoughts their child often experiences.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sherrie Eldridge sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “I believe one of the most sacrificial acts of love adoptive parents can do is to give up their pr…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, adoption, open-mindedness, útil em momentos de termino e open-mindedness.

frase_original: I believe one of the most sacrificial acts of love adoptive parents can do is to give up their preconceptions and agendas about what their child's views "should" be and be open to hear the conflicting emotions and thoughts their child often experiences.

texto: Listen to your hearts, parents! You are the expert when it comes to knowing your child. I love the Scripture that says we are to let the peace of God rule in our hearts...In other words, peace in your heart is to be like an umpire calling the shots. When in doubt--DON'T!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sherrie Eldridge: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Listen to your hearts, parents! You are the expert when it comes to knowing your child. I love th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, adoption, hearts pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de hearts e paz.

frase_original: Listen to your hearts, parents! You are the expert when it comes to knowing your child. I love the Scripture that says we are to let the peace of God rule in our hearts...In other words, peace in your heart is to be like an umpire calling the shots. When in doubt--DON'T!
